title: helichrysum cymosum subsp. cymosum
intro: Helichrysum cymosum subsp. cymosum, also known as mountain everlast or mountain paper flower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of southern Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide relief from digestive issues. Helichrysum cymosum subsp. cymosum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically in the form of creams, ointments, or salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
